code: import React,{useState}from"react";import{useCart}from"./CartContext";import"./App.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Help(){const{cart,addToCart}=useCart();const[selectedService,setSelectedService]=useState(null);const services=["Medicine","Parcel","Grocery","Bike Ride","Elder Assist"];const medicineList=["Paracetamol","Dolo 650","Cetirizine","Azithromycin","Ibuprofen"];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"help-topbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Local Help Services"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"cart",children:["\uD83D\uDED2 ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:cart.length})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"service-grid",children:services.map((s,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>setSelectedService(s),children:s},i))}),selectedService==="Medicine"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"items",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Available Medicines"}),medicineList.map((m,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:m}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>addToCart(m),children:"Add to Cart"})]},i))]}),selectedService&&selectedService!=="Medicine"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"items",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:[selectedService," Service Coming Soon"]})})]});}export default Help;
